boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute payment/invoice release/vendor-master action with PO above limit
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: No; current source records do not close the exact boundary
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Approval limit and invoice total remain missing, stale, or mismatched
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: PO exists but spending limit exceeds closure

final_answer: Source records do not close the exact action boundary. The PO exists, but the approval limit versus invoice total dependency remains unresolved, and policy requires an exact source-record match before execution. Prior history, urgency, or paper trail does not authorize payment. Escalate for the missing or mismatched control record.
